hero.title: Our
hero.description: Complete fan engagement infrastructure for professional sports. Build league and team apps powered by real-time contests (OGC), lifetime loyalty (SSC), and first-party intelligence (ProInsight). Deploy as a full app or embed modules via WebView.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack League & Team Apps
fullstack.subtitle: Complete Mobile Experience
fullstack.description: Deliver a complete mobile experience; league hub + team views with your branding, SSO, and governance. OGC and SSC run as native screens; ProInsight provides administration and reporting.
features: First-party fan ID capture (flows into ProInsight)

techSpecs.title: Deployment
items: Full-stack app (we ship the app), or
In-app embedding (WebView inside your current app)

ssc.title: Seventh Skater Club
ssc.subtitle: Lifetime Loyalty Ecosystem
ssc.description: Multi-generational loyalty program where fans progress through nine tiers from Prospect to Legend. Dual-point system (Status + Spendable) powers both long-term career progression and real-world rewards. Fully operational in OffPost demo.
features: Nine-tier career journey with automatic badge unlocks
OGC integration: points credited directly from contests

techSpecs.title: Development roadmap
items: Blockchain ledger for secure, cross-team portability

ogc.title: One-Game Contest
ogc.subtitle: Real-Time Skill-Based Gaming
ogc.description: Interactive skill-based game where fans manage 3-player lineups during live NHL games. Features complete digital sponsor asset catalog with six integrated activation types woven seamlessly into gameplay. Creates entirely new revenue streams through strategic sponsor integration at optimal engagement moments.
features: Real-time UI with lineup manager & leaderboards (rules-based/manual scoring demo)
Loyalty linkage: automatic point crediting into SSC
WebView embedding proven in OffPost demo
Full sponsor asset catalog (six activation types)

techSpecs.title: Technical
items: 2–3-week branding + SSO once pilot scope is set

proinsight.title: ProInsight Analytics
proinsight.subtitle: Enterprise Management Suite
proinsight.status: Core Platform Ready - AI Development Required
proinsight.description: Complete ecosystem management platform controlling OGC contests, Seventh Skater loyalty programs, and enterprise analytics. Teams set sponsor portal permissions while sponsors get self-service campaign tools and ROI tracking.
features: SSC loyalty program administration and rewards
Sponsor portal access with team-controlled permissions
Advanced AI predictive analytics and automation
